Package com.nib.supernaut.resources

package com.nib.supernaut.resources
Resource definition and management for Supernaut.

This package contains the resource definition classes and handles the loading, parsing, and management of CICS resource definitions such as Programs (PPT), Files (FCT), Transactions (PCT), and Terminals (TCT).

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.supernaut
    Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.

    Supernaut system resource definitions
